creator: jmrueda@diatel.upm.es
text:
This is an update for the Moodle port.

Fix: 

PORTNAME=      moodle
-PORTVERSION=   1.9.8
+PORTVERSION=   1.9.9
 CATEGORIES=    www
 MASTER_SITES=  http://download.moodle.org/stable19/ \
                http://download2.moodle.org/stable19/ \


 --- distinfo.old        2010-06-23 15:07:23.000000000 -0700
+++ distinfo    2010-06-22 11:23:13.000000000 -0700
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (moodle-1.9.8.tgz) = 184a1ce7bb222f4dd891d125d91be1c9
-SHA256 (moodle-1.9.8.tgz) = 9c3c08a35190fdbc674f056c319775bbd0bf7907bd024da6e489921e17cd7455
-SIZE (moodle-1.9.8.tgz) = 13962181
+MD5 (moodle-1.9.9.tgz) = f47d350b0b337b3057da550ea88f8695
+SHA256 (moodle-1.9.9.tgz) = 20e16da64c70f61c4c49f08aa359499a4ef500c3f8de477dc70721c07b8ec49d
+SIZE (moodle-1.9.9.tgz) = 14017622--bTNFqo5AwbkiifvyHOJiWQhgJywx1vhwfd9SLaKP66qWhh2V
